title: Katarn armor

{{Quote|I couldn't possibly repay what I owe you but I did save something that you may find useful. If you're interested, I still have my old combat armor. I don't need it anymore.|Mort|<ref name="SWG:RotW">''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Rage of the Wookiees]]''</ref>}}
'''Katarn armor''' was a type of [[battle armor]] worn by [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commandos]] of the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] during the [[Mission to Kashyyyk (Mort)|Kashyyyk campaign]]. It resembled [[Phase II clone trooper armor/Legends|Phase II clone trooper armor]], and shared a similar name to the [[Katarn-class commando armor/Legends|''Katarn''-class commando armor]]. It likewise shared its namesake, the predatory animal of [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]] known as the [[Katarn/Legends|katarn]]. Katarn [[Armor/Legends|armor]] included three variants, including [[Mark II Katarn-class commando armor|patterns II]], [[Mark III Katarn-class commando armor|III]] [[Katarn armor (Mark IV)|IV]] and [[Katarn armor (Mark VII)|VII]]. Despite being a relic of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], Katarn armor saw some use during the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. The [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]], and other non-aligned [[Spacer/Legends|spacers]] made use of this armor. Around that time, a [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] [[Commando/Legends|commando]] by the name of [[Mort]] gifted at least one of his suits of Katarn armor to an individual who enacted vengeance against one of his adversaries, a former [[Commander/Legends|commanding]] [[Officer/Legends|officer]] named [[Morkov]].

==Description==
[[File:KatarnIIandIV.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Spacers wearing Katarn armor IV and II]]
Despite having a similar name to [[Katarn-class commando armor/Legends|''Katarn''-class commando armor]] and its [[Katarn/Legends|namesake predator]], Katarn [[Armor/Legends|armor]] more closely resembled [[Phase II clone trooper armor/Legends|Phase II clone trooper armor]]. However, instead of a clean [[Color/Legends|white]] appearance, the armor was patterned in different colors, depending on its type. For instance, the [[Katarn armor (Mark II)|II patterned]] armor was mostly white, with blue markings on various pieces of the armor. The [[Katarn armor (Mark IV)|IV version]] was similar, except it had red markings and a black colored [[Utility belt/Legends|utility belt]]. Respectively, these two versions of armor somewhat resembled those worn by [[501st Legion/Legends|501st Legion]] [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] and the [[Special forces/Legends|special forces]] [[Clone shock trooper/Legends|clone shock troopers]]. The [[Katarn armor (Mark VII)|VII variety]] differed the most, in that the armor was mostly black with greenish-yellow trim. This version somewhat resembled the armor worn by [[Clone shadow trooper/Legends|clone shadow troopers]].

==History==
By the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], only the VII pattern of Katarn armor saw some use by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. On the other hand, the IV models found their way into the hands of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]], while the II variety was mostly used by neutral civilians and [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenaries]].

An [[Clone commando/Legends|ex-clone commando]] named [[Mort]] awarded at least one of his suits of Katarn armor to an individual who enacted vengeance against one of his adversaries, a former [[Commander/Legends|commanding]] [[Officer/Legends|officer]] named [[Morkov]].

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:KatarnArmorMustafar.jpg|250px|thumb|A group of troopers wearing Katarn armor on Mustafar]]
Katarn armor features in the [[Star Wars video games|MMORPG]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'' and was added to the game with the expansion pack ''Rage Of The Wookiees''. It is a quest reward for completing the quest ''Avenging Mort'', which is part of the ''Clone Relics'' quest series. The type of Katarn armor that a player receives for completing the quest depends upon which faction they are allied to, with Rebel-aligned players getting Mark IV, Imperial-aligned players getting Mark VII and neutral players getting Mark II.

==Appearances==
